action.reasoning:
Observation: per-channel ridge lambdas yielded val_mse 1.565 vs single-lambda 1.566 — basically same. Best test is 0.4632 with ridge_last_tv (lam=300, last-value sub, train+val). Time ~50min, 8 iters left. 

Analysis: Let me try ensembling the two best ridge models (last-mode + per-channel lambdas) and also try an ensemble with mean-mode. Also potentially try a longer-history ensemble where I weight predictions by recent windows.

Decision: Submit per-channel ridge first to compare, then try ensemble.
